entity.summary: Native DeFiChain decentralized exchange implemented through on-chain liquidity pools and pool-swap functions, accessible through DeFiChain wallet applications and supporting token swaps and liquidity mining.
entity.notes: First-party DeFiChain wallet documentation explicitly advertises DEX use and liquidity mining, while the official chain implementation contains pool-pair and pool-swap infrastructure. HEI consolidates the DeFiChain DEX and `defichain` discovery rows into one entity. Confidence is medium because the public wallet documentation is older and current DEX activity is additionally corroborated by the June 2026 candidate source.

evidence.title: DeFiChain app documentation
evidence.notes: First-party DeFiChain wallet repository states that the app can be used to interact with DeFiChain, liquidity mine, and use the DEX.

evidence.title: DeFiChain pool-pair and pool-swap implementation
evidence.notes: First-party DeFiChain chain implementation exposes pool-pair and pool-swap RPC infrastructure underlying the native decentralized exchange and liquidity-pool system.

evidence.title: DeFiChain DEX discovery entries
evidence.notes: June 2026 DEX candidate corpus source identifies DeFiChain DEX in the DEX category. HEI consolidates the duplicate DeFiChain DEX and `defichain` discovery rows into one entity.
